creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
Hi, Chris.  Version 1.30.1 of aumix has a workaround for a cosmetic bug in
the kernel's syscons driver which Yokota corrected in 3.4-RC circa
1999-12-8.  It also has a fix for an inconsequential bug in aumix. This
patch just bumps the version number and checksum.

How-To-Repeat: N/A
